legal_notice.title: Sovereign Trace Protocol — Integrity Violation Filing
content: This form permanently seals a record of an integrity violation.
All fields are public. The record is immutable after submission.
**You do not need to be a certified auditor to file this.**
Anyone who witnesses or experiences a violation may file.
Violations include: bribery, badge offered outside official process,
coercion, falsified audit findings, or any conduct that compromises
the integrity of the STP ledger.
**This record cannot be deleted.** File with accuracy.
False filings are also permanently sealed and attributed to the filer.

fields.label: Violation Type
options: Bribery — payment offered to influence audit findings
Badge Misuse — badge used outside authorized scope
Coercion — pressure applied to alter findings
Falsified Findings — audit report does not reflect actual review
Unauthorized Badge Transfer — badge sold or given to another party
Annual Cap Exceeded — more than 50 audits filed in calendar year

fields.label: Evidence and Description
fields.description: Describe exactly what occurred. Be specific. This is the permanent record.
fields.placeholder: On March 7, 2026, STP-AUDITOR-XXXX offered to certify our outputs without review in exchange for $5,000 paid outside the official system.

fields.label: Evidence Upload
fields.description: Upload screenshots, communications, or documents supporting the violation claim.

fields.label: Your LinkedIn Profile URL
fields.description: Your identity is attached to this filing permanently.

fields.label: Declaration
options: I declare that the information in this filing is accurate to the best of my knowledge.
I understand that false filings are permanently sealed and attributed to me.
I understand this record is public, immutable, and cannot be removed after submission.

steps: Sealing — Sealed with a FROZEN-2.0 triple-time cryptographic stamp. Permanent.
Ledger entry — Enters the Sovereign Trace ledger with filer identity, timestamp, and SHA-256 hash.
Notification — You receive your ledger entry ID and SHA-256 hash.
Resolution — If violation is substantiated, badge revocation proceedings begin.
after_submit.footer:
The seal is the accusation. The ledger is the permanent record.

Sovereign Trace Protocol | Sheldon K. Salmon | aionsystem2026@gmail.com
